mapper.sql: order_no, date_type, id, date_name, state_code, change_times, state_date, state_des, create_time, update_time, mindate, maxdate, provider, delayday, remark, firstdate
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.order_statedetail
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.order_statedetail (order_no, date_type, id, date_name, state_code, change_times, state_date, state_des, create_time, update_time, mindate, maxdate, provider, delayday, remark, firstdate) values (#{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dateType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dateName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{stateCode,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{changeTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{stateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{stateDes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{mindate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{maxdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{provider,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delayday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{firstdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into dbo.order_statedetail
order_no,
date_type,
id,
date_name,
state_code,
change_times,
state_date,
state_des,
create_time,
update_time,
mindate,
maxdate,
provider,
delayday,
remark,
firstdate,
#{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dateType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{dateName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{stateCode,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{changeTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{stateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{stateDes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{mindate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{maxdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{provider,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{delayday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{firstdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update dbo.order_statedetail
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
date_type = #{record.dateType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
date_name = #{record.dateName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
state_code = #{record.stateCode,jdbcType=INTEGER},
change_times = #{record.changeTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER},
state_date = #{record.stateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
state_des = #{record.stateDes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mindate = #{record.mindate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
maxdate = #{record.maxdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
provider = #{record.provider,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delayday = #{record.delayday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
firstdate = #{record.firstdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update dbo.order_statedetail set order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, date_type = #{record.dateType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, date_name = #{record.dateName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, state_code = #{record.stateCode,jdbcType=INTEGER}, change_times = #{record.changeTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER}, state_date = #{record.stateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, state_des = #{record.stateDes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, mindate = #{record.mindate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, maxdate = #{record.maxdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, provider = #{record.provider,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delayday = #{record.delayday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, firstdate = #{record.firstdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update dbo.order_statedetail
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
date_name = #{dateName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
state_code = #{stateCode,jdbcType=INTEGER},
change_times = #{changeTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER},
state_date = #{stateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
state_des = #{stateDes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mindate = #{mindate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
maxdate = #{maxdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
provider = #{provider,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delayday = #{delayday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
firstdate = #{firstdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and date_type = #{dateType,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo.order_statedetail set id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, date_name = #{dateName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, state_code = #{stateCode,jdbcType=INTEGER}, change_times = #{changeTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER}, state_date = #{stateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, state_des = #{stateDes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, mindate = #{mindate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, maxdate = #{maxdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, provider = #{provider,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delayday = #{delayday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, firstdate = #{firstdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and date_type = #{dateType,jdbcType=INTEGER}
